step_rationale: Xc- transporter; ferroptosis inhibition suppresses oxidative stress and inflammation in atherosclerosis.
mechanism: System xc- antiporter that suppresses ferroptosis-driven lipid peroxidation and inflammatory cell death in atherosclerotic plaque macrophages.

references.title: Comprehensive metagenomic and lipidomic analysis showed that baicalin could improve depressive behaviour in atherosclerotic mice by inhibiting nerve cell ferroptosis.
Integrating metagenomics, lipidomics and proteomics to explore the effect and mechanism of ginsenoside Rb1 on atherosclerosis co-depression disease.
references.journal: Phytomedicine : international journal of phytotherapy and phytopharmacology
